mapper.select: select * from reviews where shop_id = #{shopId} order by created_at desc
select * from reviews where user_id = #{userId} order by created_at desc
select coalesce(avg(score), 0) from reviews where shop_id = #{shopId}
select count(1) from reviews where shop_id = #{shopId}
select * from reviews order by like_count desc, created_at desc limit #{size} offset #{offset}

select r.* from reviews r join shops s on r.shop_id = s.id where (#{keyword} is null or #{keyword} = '' or lower(s.name) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(r.content) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))) and (#{shopType} is null or #{shopType} = '' or s.type = #{shopType}) order by r.like_count desc, r.created_at desc limit #{size} offset #{offset}

select count(1) from reviews r join shops s on r.shop_id = s.id where (#{keyword} is null or #{keyword} = '' or lower(s.name) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(r.content) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))) and (#{shopType} is null or #{shopType} = '' or s.type = #{shopType})

select r.* from reviews r join shops s on r.shop_id = s.id where (#{keyword} is null or #{keyword} = '' or lower(s.name) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(r.content) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))) and (#{shopType} is null or #{shopType} = '' or s.type = #{shopType}) order by r.created_at desc limit #{size} offset #{offset}

select count(1) from reviews r join shops s on r.shop_id = s.id where (#{keyword} is null or #{keyword} = '' or lower(s.name) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(r.content) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))) and (#{shopType} is null or #{shopType} = '' or s.type = #{shopType})
